variables.name: proxmox_node
variables.description: Proxmox node name where VMs will be created.

variables.name: vm_count
variables.description: Number of VMs to provision in the cluster.

variables.name: name_prefix
variables.description: Prefix for VM names (e.g. 'worker' produces worker-0, worker-1 …).

variables.name: vmid_base
variables.description: Starting VM ID. Each VM gets vmid_base + index (e.g. 400, 401, 402).

variables.name: template_name
variables.description: Name of the Proxmox VM template to clone.

variables.name: cores
variables.description: Number of vCPU cores per VM.

variables.name: disk_size
variables.description: Disk size in gigabytes per VM.

variables.name: storage_pool
variables.description: Proxmox storage pool for VM disks.

variables.name: ip_config_base
variables.description: Base IP config for sequential assignment. Use 'dhcp' or a CIDR prefix like '192.168.1.10' (index is added to last octet).

variables.name: gateway
variables.description: Default gateway IP. Required when ip_config_base is not 'dhcp'.

variables.name: ssh_public_key
variables.description: SSH public key injected via cloud-init.
